drawingTitle.description: title in the drawing's TITLE box of the title block; do not use the page header/footer or the List of Material top row; null if the TITLE box is blank

drawingNumber.description: drawing/document number in the title block's drawing-number box; do not use the manual's footer publication number or a part number; null if not printed in the title block

revision.description: revision identifier from the title block's revision block; do not use any revision in the page header/footer; null if the revision block is empty

organization.description: Issuing organization or facility named in the title block

listOfMaterial.description: Rows of the List of Material table on the drawing

itemNo.description: Item or find number from the ITEM NO. column

partNo.description: Part number from the PART NO column

material.description: Material called out for this part
